info.title: BeTalent Payments API
info.description: REST API for payment processing with gateway fallback and role-based access.

Forbidden.description: Access token is missing or invalid

Any.description: Any JSON object not defined as schema

post.summary: Authenticate a user and issue an access token (store)

patch.summary: Update the activation status of a gateway (updateStatus)
Update the priority of a gateway (updatePriority)

get.summary: Show a client with transaction history (show)
